summary: P4: Legal & Compliance Guardian testing completed. Backend: 34/34 tests passed (100%). All Legal Guardian endpoints working correctly: Outreach Legal Gate (DSGVO, UWG, Suppression, Opt-Out, Fit-Score), Contract Legal Gate, Communication Legal Gate, Invoice Legal Gate, Risk Management, Audit Log, Compliance Summary, Opt-Out (Admin and Public).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Outreach Legal Gate: DSGVO, UWG Kaltansprache (§7 UWG), Suppression, Opt-Out, Fit-Score checks working
✅ UWG Kaltansprache: E-Mail without consent = high risk, Phone B2B = medium, with consent = OK
✅ Outreach blocked for suppressed/opted-out emails (critical risk)
✅ Fit-Score below 30 = medium risk on outreach
✅ Contract Legal Gate: Checks legal modules, calculation, customer data
✅ Contract send blocked when legal_svc detects high/critical risk (gate_blocked: true)
✅ Communication Legal Gate: Opt-Out check, KI-Transparenz, Impressum
✅ Invoice Legal Gate: MwSt, Kunde, Rechnungsnummer checks
✅ Risk Management: Add, resolve, list risks with filtering
✅ Audit Log: All legal checks create audit entries, filterable by type
✅ Compliance Summary: Aggregates risks, audits, opt-outs, suppressions
✅ All admin endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
✅ Legal check results persisted on contract (legal_check field)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with prefix 'TEST_LEGAL_P4_' and 'TEST_CONTRACT_LEGAL_' for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 Legal & Compliance Guardian fully tested. Endpoints: POST /api/admin/legal/check-outreach (DSGVO, UWG, Suppression, Opt-Out, Fit-Score), POST /api/admin/legal/check-contract/{id} (legal modules, calculation, customer), POST /api/admin/legal/check-communication (opt-out, KI-transparenz, impressum), POST /api/admin/legal/check-billing/{id} (MwSt, customer, numbering), POST /api/admin/legal/risks (add risk), PATCH /api/admin/legal/risks/{id}/resolve, GET /api/admin/legal/risks (filter by entity_type, resolved), GET /api/admin/legal/audit (filter by type, limit), GET /api/admin/legal/compliance (summary), POST /api/admin/legal/opt-out (admin), POST /api/public/opt-out (no auth). Contract send endpoint auto-checks legal before sending - blocks if high/critical risk. All checks stored in db.legal_audit, risks in db.legal_risks, opt-outs in db.opt_outs (also auto-added to db.suppression_list).

outreach_legal_gate.uwg_kaltansprache_phone_b2b: ✅ Phone B2B without relationship = medium risk

contract_legal_gate.send_blocking: ✅ Contract send blocked for high/critical risk

features_tested.authentication: ✅ All admin endpoints require Bearer token

mocked_apis.note: No external APIs needed for legal guardian — all checks are local logic against DB
